program_title: Product Constitution And AI Control Plane
scope: Implement the HermesGate primary entity identifier policy only, using canonical hg_ lowercase snake-case gate_id values before tenant scope and full HermesGate model behavior are implemented.
implemented_changes: Moves the current control-plane subphase to RP00.P01.M03.S02 in implemented state.

Adds HERMES_GATE_IDENTIFIER_POLICY for the HermesGate gate_id primary identifier with stable hg_ prefix, canonical lowercase snake-case pattern, forbidden forms, no-real-data/no-write boundaries, tenant scope deferral to RP00.P01.M03.S03, and next boundary RP00.P01.M03.S03.
Adds normalizeHermesGateId and validateHermesGateId exports with fail-closed canonical identifier handling.
Exposes hermesGateIdentifierPolicy through CONTROL_PLANE_DOMAIN_MODEL_REGISTRY while keeping the HermesGate entity implementedInFutureSubphase=true and implementedSubphase=null.
Extends the synthetic fixture with hermes_gate_identifier evidence using hg_rp00_h00_control_plane.
Extends the RP00 validator and README with machine checks for the HermesGate primary identifier slice.
non_goals: Does not implement HermesGate tenant scope, Matter trace reference, lifecycle status enum, ownership metadata, reference relationship map, required/optional field registry, state transition map, validation helper, or full HermesGate model factory.
Does not execute production mutation or runtime target writes.
Does not import or use real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data.
Does not weaken or re-open ProductContract, AIControlRule, or HermesGate package-layout production_ready slices.
Does not implement ClaudeReviewGate, HumanApproval, or BlockedClaim.
Does not replace H00, C00, or human approval.
Does not close RP00.P01, RP00, or RP00.P01.M03.S03.
claude_questions: Does RP00.P01.M03.S02 implement only the HermesGate primary identifier policy and avoid claiming full HermesGate model completion?

Does HERMES_GATE_IDENTIFIER_POLICY enforce gate_id, hg_ stable prefix, lowercase snake-case canonical pattern, tenant scope deferral to RP00.P01.M03.S03, no-real-data/no-write boundaries, and next boundary RP00.P01.M03.S03?

Do normalizeHermesGateId and validateHermesGateId accept canonical fixture IDs, trim input for normalization, reject stored whitespace, and reject missing prefix, uppercase, hyphenated, double-underscore, and path/URL-like values?
Does CONTROL_PLANE_DOMAIN_MODEL_REGISTRY expose hermesGateIdentifierPolicy while keeping the HermesGate entity future-only with implementedSubphase=null?

Does the synthetic fixture record hermes_gate_identifier with gate_id=hg_rp00_h00_control_plane, policy_ref=HERMES_GATE_IDENTIFIER_POLICY, no_real_data=true, writes_product_state=false, and next_subphase=RP00.P01.M03.S03?

Does the validator enforce S02 exports, fixture evidence, invalid identifier rejection, no-write policy, actual Claude dependency, construction inspection, and next-boundary evidence before production_ready?
risk_focus: Accidentally claiming HermesGate full model completion from an identifier-only slice.
Accepting noncanonical or mutable HermesGate identifiers that would weaken command evidence and blocked-claim traceability.
Advancing tenant scope or model validation before RP00.P01.M03.S03-S11.
Skipping actual Claude C00 review or construction inspection before production_ready.
